form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when seventh and beaten 10 lengths at Wentworth Park. Form solid prior to that including a win at Wentworth Park three back. Best figures puts her right in this and well worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when seventh and beaten 10 lengths at Wentworth Park. Form solid prior to that including a win at Wentworth Park three back. Best figures puts her right in this and well worth another chance.

form.formComment: Showing promise and was a winner three back. Last start missed the frame when a 12 length fourth (30.55) at Wentworth Park. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showing promise and was a winner three back. Last start missed the frame when a 12 length fourth (30.55) at Wentworth Park. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Could manage only eighth last time but impressed the start prior when he recorded a blistering 29.64 over 520m when went down narrowly, at Wentworth Park. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only eighth last time but impressed the start prior when he recorded a blistering 29.64 over 520m when went down narrowly, at Wentworth Park. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

form.formComment: In the money last time at The Gardens (30.26) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.3 lengths third. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at The Gardens (30.26) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.3 lengths third. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (29.67) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Drawn awkwardly. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (29.67) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Drawn awkwardly. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Dominant winner showing plenty of speed to post a big 12 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dazzling 29.15 for the 520m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Dominant winner showing plenty of speed to post a big 12 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dazzling 29.15 for the 520m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 365m (20.80) beating Unstoppable Mist in Maiden on April 9. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 365m (20.80) beating Unstoppable Mist in Maiden on April 9. Hard to envisage a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels exiting the first turn and ran wide, losing ground.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Wentworth Park, clocking an excellent 29.68 for the 520m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.
